title: Audit ferrolearn-linear vs sklearn (linear_model + svm + isotonic + discriminant_analysis): close gaps, add API proof tests
description:
Step 5 of 12 in sklearn parity audit (#240).

Largest single crate. Scope: sklearn.linear_model (~38 estimators including all CV variants, LARS family, GLMs, multi-task), sklearn.svm (SVC, NuSVC, LinearSVC, SVR, NuSVR, LinearSVR, OneClassSVM), sklearn.isotonic, sklearn.discriminant_analysis (LDA, QDA).

Related existing issues: #19-22 (MultiTaskLasso/ElasticNet/CV), #24 (TheilSen), #29 (LogisticRegression L1/elasticnet), #30 (SGD momentum/penalties), #171 (FixedThresholdClassifier/TunedThresholdClassifierCV)
